description: Create a heavy-weather emergency anchorage training exercise for Bridge Command set in the Solent's Cowes Roads anchorage. Create a scenario directory at '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/n) Cowes Roads Emergency Anchorage/' containing environment.ini, ownship.ini, and othership.ini. The environment must be set in the Solent on 18th Nov 2024 at 14:30 with visibility 2.0-5.0nm, weather 5-7, and rain 1. The own ship 'MV Doris Cleaveley' should be positioned in the Eastern Solent approach (~50.76, -1.10) heading West (~280) at 10kts. The othership.ini must include exactly 4 vessels: two anchored at Cowes Roads and two underway (one ferry, one coaster) with waypoints. Configure 'bc5.ini' for close-quarters radar (full_radar=1, arpa_on=1, radar_range_resolution=128, max_radar_range=24, hide_instruments=0). Generate an approach plan at '/home/ga/Documents/anchorage_approach_plan.txt' including the vessel name, at least 3 approach waypoints (lat/long), VHF channels for Southampton VTS (12) and Cowes (69), and anchor procedures. Login: ga / password123.
